subcodes.first_line: O ye blossoms of the garden of divine knowledge! In these times when the nations of the world rise in resistance to the Cause of the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گلهای بوستان عرفان در این اوقات که امم عالم مقاومت با امر اسم اعظم خواهند
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant
